heading: Assistance provided outside of North Korea
label: 7833 Assistance provided outside of North Korea

children.heading: Assistance
children.label: a Assistance
children.text: The President is authorized to provide assistance to support organizations or persons that provide humanitarian assistance to North Koreans who are outside of North Korea without the permission of the Government of North Korea.
humanitarian assistance to North Korean refugees, defectors, migrants, and orphans outside of North Korea, which may include support for refugee camps or temporary settlements; and

humanitarian assistance to North Korean women outside of North Korea who are victims of trafficking, as defined in section 7102(15) of this title, or are in danger of being trafficked.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: In addition to funds otherwise available for such purposes, there are authorized to be appropriated to the President $5,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 2018 through 2022 to carry out this section.

children.heading: Availability
children.label: 2 Availability
children.text: Amounts appropriated pursuant to the authorization of appropriations under paragraph (1) are authorized to remain available until expended.
